variables.cloudInitTemplate:
#cloud-config
hostname: {{CLUSTER_NAME}}-login
manage_etc_hosts: true

bootcmd:
  - systemctl stop unattended-upgrades.service apt-daily.service apt-daily-upgrade.service apt-daily.timer apt-daily-upgrade.timer 2>/dev/null || true
  - systemctl mask unattended-upgrades.service apt-daily.service apt-daily-upgrade.service apt-daily.timer apt-daily-upgrade.timer 2>/dev/null || true
  - pkill -9 -f 'unattended-upgrade|apt-get|apt\.systemd\.daily' 2>/dev/null || true

package_update: true
package_upgrade: false

packages:
  - curl
  - ca-certificates
  - jq
  - nfs-common
  - munge
  - libmunge2

write_files:
  - path: /etc/azcluster/cluster.env
    permissions: '0644'
    content: |
      AZCLUSTER_NAME={{CLUSTER_NAME}}
      AZCLUSTER_SCHEDULER={{SCHEDULER_IP}}
      AZCLUSTER_REPO={{AZCLUSTER_REPO}}
      AZCLUSTER_VERSION={{AZCLUSTER_VERSION}}
      AZCLUSTER_ROLE=login
      SHARED_MOUNT_IP={{SHARED_MOUNT_IP}}
      SHARED_EXPORT_PATH={{SHARED_EXPORT_PATH}}
      AMLFS_MOUNT_CMD={{AMLFS_MOUNT_CMD}}
      EXTRA_PACKAGES="{{EXTRA_PACKAGES}}"
      STORAGE_ACCOUNT_NAME={{STORAGE_ACCOUNT_NAME}}
      STORAGE_DATA_CONTAINER_URL={{STORAGE_DATA_CONTAINER_URL}}
      AZCP_VERSION={{AZCP_VERSION}}
  - path: /etc/profile.d/azcluster.sh
    permissions: '0644'
    content: |
      export AZCLUSTER_NAME={{CLUSTER_NAME}}
      export AZCLUSTER_SCHEDULER={{SCHEDULER_IP}}
      export SLURM_CONF_SERVER={{SCHEDULER_IP}}:6817
  - path: /etc/apt/preferences.d/slurm-repository-pin-990
    permissions: '0644'
    content: |
      Package: slurm-smd*
      Pin: origin "packages.microsoft.com"
      Pin-Priority: 990
  - path: /opt/azcluster/install-login.sh
    permissions: '0755'
    content: |
      #!/usr/bin/env bash
      set -euo pipefail
      # Defense-in-depth chmod (see scheduler.yaml.tmpl for rationale): if this
      # script aborts before the chmod block, plugstack.conf would stay 0600
      # and break Pyxis-using srun submissions from non-root users.
      trap 'chmod 0644 /etc/slurm/plugstack.conf 2>/dev/null || true' EXIT
      . /etc/azcluster/cluster.env

      if [ -n "${EXTRA_PACKAGES:-}" ]; then
        apt-get -o DPkg::Lock::Timeout=600 install -y ${EXTRA_PACKAGES}
      fi

      mkdir -p /shared /var/log/azcluster /etc/slurm

      if ! grep -q " /shared " /etc/fstab; then
        echo "${SHARED_MOUNT_IP}:/${SHARED_EXPORT_PATH} /shared nfs rw,hard,rsize=262144,wsize=262144,vers=4.1,tcp,_netdev 0 0" >> /etc/fstab
      fi
      for i in $(seq 1 60); do
        mountpoint -q /shared && break
        mount /shared && break
        echo "waiting for NFS at ${SHARED_MOUNT_IP}:/${SHARED_EXPORT_PATH}..."
        sleep 5
      done
      mountpoint -q /shared

      if [ -n "${AMLFS_MOUNT_CMD:-}" ]; then
        mkdir -p /amlfs
        apt-get -o DPkg::Lock::Timeout=600 install -y --no-install-recommends amlfs-lustre-client-$(uname -r) || apt-get -o DPkg::Lock::Timeout=600 install -y --no-install-recommends amlfs-lustre-client || true
        if ! mountpoint -q /amlfs; then
          eval "${AMLFS_MOUNT_CMD} /amlfs" || echo "AMLFS mount failed; continuing" >&2
        fi
      fi

      SCHED_DIR="/shared/sched/${AZCLUSTER_NAME}"
      while [ ! -f "${SCHED_DIR}/munge.key" ]; do sleep 5; done
      install -o munge -g munge -m 0400 "${SCHED_DIR}/munge.key" /etc/munge/munge.key

      curl -fsSL https://packages.microsoft.com/keys/microsoft.asc | gpg --batch --yes --dearmor -o /usr/share/keyrings/microsoft-prod.gpg
      ARCH=$(dpkg --print-architecture)
      CODENAME=$(. /etc/os-release; echo "${VERSION_CODENAME}")
      echo "deb [arch=${ARCH} signed-by=/usr/share/keyrings/microsoft-prod.gpg] https://packages.microsoft.com/repos/slurm-ubuntu-${CODENAME} stable main" > /etc/apt/sources.list.d/slurm.list
      apt-get -o DPkg::Lock::Timeout=600 update
      apt-get -o DPkg::Lock::Timeout=600 install -y --no-install-recommends \
        slurm-smd \
        slurm-smd-client \
        slurm-smd-sackd

      mkdir -p /opt/pyxis
      BASE="https://github.com/${AZCLUSTER_REPO}/releases/download/${AZCLUSTER_VERSION}"
      curl -fsSL --retry 8 --retry-delay 5 -o /opt/pyxis/spank_pyxis.so "${BASE}/spank_pyxis-${AZCLUSTER_VERSION}-x86_64-linux.so"
      chmod 0755 /opt/pyxis/spank_pyxis.so

      mkdir -p /etc/slurm
      cat > /etc/slurm/plugstack.conf <<EOF
      required /opt/pyxis/spank_pyxis.so runtime_path=/var/lib/enroot/runtime
      EOF
      # cloud-init runcmd inherits a 0077 umask; plugstack.conf MUST be
      # world-readable because srun loads spank plugins at submit time.
      chmod 0644 /etc/slurm/plugstack.conf

      getent group slurm >/dev/null || groupadd -g 11100 slurm
      id slurm >/dev/null 2>&1 || useradd -u 11100 -g 11100 -d /var/lib/slurm -s /usr/sbin/nologin -c "Slurm" slurm

      mkdir -p /run/slurm/conf
      cat > /etc/profile.d/slurm-configless.sh <<EOF
      export SLURM_CONF=/run/slurm/conf/slurm.conf
      EOF
      cat > /etc/systemd/system/sackd.service <<EOF
      [Unit]
      Description=Slurm auth/cred daemon (configless client)
      After=network-online.target munge.service remote-fs.target
      Wants=network-online.target munge.service
      [Service]
      Type=notify
      ExecStart=/usr/sbin/sackd --systemd --conf-server ${AZCLUSTER_SCHEDULER}:6817
      Restart=on-failure
      RestartSec=10
      [Install]
      WantedBy=multi-user.target
      EOF

      systemctl daemon-reload
      systemctl enable munge
      systemctl restart munge

      NODE_EXP_VER=1.8.2
      cd /tmp
      curl -fsSL --retry 8 --retry-delay 5 -O "https://github.com/prometheus/node_exporter/releases/download/v${NODE_EXP_VER}/node_exporter-${NODE_EXP_VER}.linux-amd64.tar.gz"
      tar -xzf "node_exporter-${NODE_EXP_VER}.linux-amd64.tar.gz"
      install -m 0755 "node_exporter-${NODE_EXP_VER}.linux-amd64/node_exporter" /usr/local/bin/node_exporter
      id -u node_exporter >/dev/null 2>&1 || useradd --system --no-create-home --shell /usr/sbin/nologin node_exporter
      cat > /etc/systemd/system/node_exporter.service <<'EOF'
      [Unit]
      Description=Prometheus Node Exporter
      After=network-online.target
      Wants=network-online.target
      [Service]
      User=node_exporter
      ExecStart=/usr/local/bin/node_exporter --web.listen-address=127.0.0.1:9100
      Restart=on-failure
      RestartSec=5
      [Install]
      WantedBy=multi-user.target
      EOF
      systemctl daemon-reload
      systemctl enable --now node_exporter

      MON_UAI_CLIENT_ID="{{MON_UAI_CLIENT_ID}}"
      AMW_INGEST_URL="{{AMW_INGEST_URL}}"
      if [ -n "${MON_UAI_CLIENT_ID}" ] && [ -n "${AMW_INGEST_URL}" ]; then
        PROM_VER=3.3.0
        cd /tmp
        curl -fsSL --retry 8 --retry-delay 5 -O "https://github.com/prometheus/prometheus/releases/download/v${PROM_VER}/prometheus-${PROM_VER}.linux-amd64.tar.gz"
        tar -xzf "prometheus-${PROM_VER}.linux-amd64.tar.gz"
        install -d /opt/prometheus
        install -m 0755 "prometheus-${PROM_VER}.linux-amd64/prometheus" /opt/prometheus/prometheus
        install -d /mnt/prometheus/data
        id -u prometheus >/dev/null 2>&1 || useradd --system --no-create-home --shell /usr/sbin/nologin prometheus
        chown -R prometheus:prometheus /opt/prometheus /mnt/prometheus
        INSTANCE_NAME=$(hostname)
        SUBSCRIPTION_ID="{{SUBSCRIPTION_ID}}"
        RG_NAME=$(curl -fsSL -H Metadata:true "http://169.254.169.254/metadata/instance/compute/resourceGroupName?api-version=2021-02-01&format=text")
        cat > /opt/prometheus/prometheus.yml <<EOF
      global:
        scrape_interval: 15s
        evaluation_interval: 15s
        external_labels:
          subscription: ${SUBSCRIPTION_ID}
          cluster: ${RG_NAME}/{{CLUSTER_NAME}}
          nodename: ${INSTANCE_NAME}
          role: login
      remote_write:
        - url: "${AMW_INGEST_URL}"
          azuread:
            cloud: AzurePublic
            managed_identity:
              client_id: ${MON_UAI_CLIENT_ID}
      scrape_configs:
        - job_name: node_exporter
          static_configs:
            - targets: ['127.0.0.1:9100']
      EOF
        chmod 0644 /opt/prometheus/prometheus.yml
        cat > /etc/systemd/system/prometheus.service <<'EOF'
      [Unit]
      Description=Prometheus
      After=network-online.target
      Wants=network-online.target
      [Service]
      User=prometheus
      ExecStart=/opt/prometheus/prometheus --config.file=/opt/prometheus/prometheus.yml --storage.tsdb.path=/mnt/prometheus/data --web.listen-address=127.0.0.1:9090
      Restart=on-failure
      RestartSec=10
      [Install]
      WantedBy=multi-user.target
      EOF
        systemctl daemon-reload
        systemctl enable --now prometheus
      fi

      if [ -x /usr/sbin/sackd ]; then
        systemctl enable --now sackd
      fi

      DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get -o DPkg::Lock::Timeout=600 install -y \
        sssd sssd-ldap sssd-tools libnss-sss libpam-sss oddjob-mkhomedir
      cat > /etc/sssd/sssd.conf <<EOF
      [sssd]
      domains = azcluster
      config_file_version = 2
      services = nss, pam, ssh

      [domain/azcluster]
      id_provider = ldap
      auth_provider = ldap
      ldap_uri = ldap://${AZCLUSTER_SCHEDULER}
      ldap_search_base = dc=azcluster,dc=local
      ldap_user_extra_attrs = sshPublicKey:sshPublicKey
      ldap_user_ssh_public_key = sshPublicKey
      enumerate = false
      cache_credentials = true
      override_homedir = /shared/home/%u
      entry_cache_timeout = 60
      entry_cache_user_timeout = 60
      EOF
      chmod 0600 /etc/sssd/sssd.conf
      chown root:root /etc/sssd/sssd.conf
      pam-auth-update --enable mkhomedir
      sed -i 's|^session\s\+optional\s\+pam_mkhomedir\.so.*|session optional pam_mkhomedir.so umask=0077|' /etc/pam.d/common-session || true
      if ! grep -q '^AuthorizedKeysCommand /usr/bin/sss_ssh_authorizedkeys' /etc/ssh/sshd_config; then
        printf '\nAuthorizedKeysCommand /usr/bin/sss_ssh_authorizedkeys\nAuthorizedKeysCommandUser nobody\n' >> /etc/ssh/sshd_config
      fi
      systemctl enable --now sssd
      systemctl restart ssh

      cat > /etc/sudoers.d/cluster-admins <<'SUDOERS'
      %cluster-admins ALL=(ALL) NOPASSWD: ALL
      SUDOERS
      chmod 0440 /etc/sudoers.d/cluster-admins
      visudo -cf /etc/sudoers.d/cluster-admins

      if [ -n "${AZCP_VERSION:-}" ]; then
        AZCP_URL="https://github.com/edwardsp/azcp/releases/download/${AZCP_VERSION}/azcp-x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu.tar.gz"
        curl -fsSL -o /tmp/azcp.tar.gz "${AZCP_URL}"
        tar -xzf /tmp/azcp.tar.gz --strip-components=1 -C /usr/local/bin/ azcp-x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu/azcp
        chmod 0755 /usr/local/bin/azcp
        rm -f /tmp/azcp.tar.gz
      fi

      if [ -n "${STORAGE_ACCOUNT_NAME:-}" ]; then
        cat > /etc/profile.d/azcluster-storage.sh <<'PROFILE_EOF'
      export AZCLUSTER_STORAGE_ACCOUNT="{{STORAGE_ACCOUNT_NAME}}"
      export AZCLUSTER_STORAGE_URL="{{STORAGE_DATA_CONTAINER_URL}}"
      export AZCLUSTER_USER_BLOB_URL="${AZCLUSTER_STORAGE_URL}/users/${USER}"
      export AZCLUSTER_USER_NVME="/mnt/nvme/users/${USER}"
      export AZCLUSTER_SHARED_BLOB_URL="${AZCLUSTER_STORAGE_URL}/shared"
      export AZURE_CLIENT_ID="{{UAI_CLIENT_ID}}"
      PROFILE_EOF
        sed -i 's|^      ||' /etc/profile.d/azcluster-storage.sh
        chmod 0644 /etc/profile.d/azcluster-storage.sh
      fi

      touch /var/log/azcluster/ready

runcmd:
  - systemctl stop unattended-upgrades.service apt-daily.service apt-daily-upgrade.service 2>/dev/null || true
  - systemctl mask unattended-upgrades.service apt-daily.service apt-daily-upgrade.service apt-daily.timer apt-daily-upgrade.timer 2>/dev/null || true
  - bash -lc 'i=0; while fuser /var/lib/dpkg/lock-frontend /var/lib/dpkg/lock /var/lib/apt/lists/lock >/dev/null 2>&1; do sleep 5; i=$((i+1)); [ $i -gt 120 ] && break; done'
  - bash -lc 'mkdir -p /var/log/azcluster && /opt/azcluster/install-login.sh 2>&1 | tee -a /var/log/azcluster/install.log'
variables.cloudInit: [replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(variables('cloudInitTemplate'), '{{ADMIN_USER}}', parameters('adminUsername')), '{{CLUSTER_NAME}}', parameters('clusterName')), '{{SCHEDULER_IP}}', parameters('schedulerPrivateIp')), '{{SHARED_MOUNT_IP}}', parameters('sharedMountIp')), '{{SHARED_EXPORT_PATH}}', parameters('sharedExportPath')), '{{AZCLUSTER_VERSION}}', parameters('azclusterVersion')), '{{AZCLUSTER_REPO}}', parameters('azclusterRepo')), '{{AMLFS_MOUNT_CMD}}', parameters('amlfsMountCommand')), '{{MON_UAI_CLIENT_ID}}', parameters('monUaiClientId')), '{{AMW_INGEST_URL}}', parameters('amwIngestionEndpoint')), '{{SUBSCRIPTION_ID}}', subscription().subscriptionId), '{{EXTRA_PACKAGES}}', parameters('extraPackages')), '{{STORAGE_ACCOUNT_NAME}}', parameters('storageAccountName')), '{{STORAGE_BLOB_ENDPOINT}}', parameters('storageBlobEndpoint')), '{{STORAGE_DATA_CONTAINER_URL}}', parameters('storageDataContainerUrl')), '{{AZCP_VERSION}}', parameters('azcpVersion')), '{{UAI_CLIENT_ID}}', parameters('clusterUaiClientId'))]
variables.combinedUaiIds: [union(if(variables('hasMonUai'), createObject(format('{0}', parameters('monUaiId')), createObject()), createObject()), if(variables('hasClusterUai'), createObject(format('{0}', parameters('clusterUaiId')), createObject()), createObject()))]

variables.cloudInitTemplate:
#cloud-config
manage_etc_hosts: false

bootcmd:
  - systemctl stop unattended-upgrades.service apt-daily.service apt-daily-upgrade.service apt-daily.timer apt-daily-upgrade.timer 2>/dev/null || true
  - systemctl mask unattended-upgrades.service apt-daily.service apt-daily-upgrade.service apt-daily.timer apt-daily-upgrade.timer 2>/dev/null || true
  - pkill -9 -f 'unattended-upgrade|apt-get|apt\.systemd\.daily' 2>/dev/null || true

package_update: true
package_upgrade: false

packages:
  - curl
  - ca-certificates
  - jq
  - nfs-common
  - munge
  - libmunge2
  - libcap2
  - squashfs-tools
  - parallel
  - fuse-overlayfs
  - pigz
  - zstd

write_files:
  - path: /etc/azcluster/install.env
    permissions: '0644'
    content: |
      AZCLUSTER_VERSION={{AZCLUSTER_VERSION}}
      AZCLUSTER_REPO={{AZCLUSTER_REPO}}
      AZCLUSTER_NAME={{CLUSTER_NAME}}
      AZCLUSTER_ROLE=compute
      AZCLUSTER_POOL={{POOL_NAME}}
      SCHEDULER_IP={{SCHEDULER_IP}}
      SHARED_MOUNT_IP={{SHARED_MOUNT_IP}}
      SHARED_EXPORT_PATH={{SHARED_EXPORT_PATH}}
      AMLFS_MOUNT_CMD={{AMLFS_MOUNT_CMD}}
      EXTRA_PACKAGES="{{EXTRA_PACKAGES}}"
      STORAGE_ACCOUNT_NAME={{STORAGE_ACCOUNT_NAME}}
      STORAGE_DATA_CONTAINER_URL={{STORAGE_DATA_CONTAINER_URL}}
      AZCP_VERSION={{AZCP_VERSION}}
      ENROOT_VERSION=4.0.1
  - path: /etc/apt/preferences.d/slurm-repository-pin-990
    permissions: '0644'
    content: |
      Package: slurm-smd*
      Pin: origin "packages.microsoft.com"
      Pin-Priority: 990
  - path: /etc/systemd/system/slurmd.service
    permissions: '0644'
    content: |
      [Unit]
      Description=Slurm node daemon (dynamic, configless)
      After=network-online.target munge.service remote-fs.target
      Wants=network-online.target munge.service
      ConditionPathExists=/etc/munge/munge.key

      [Service]
      Type=simple
      EnvironmentFile=/etc/default/slurmd
      ExecStart=/usr/sbin/slurmd -D -Z $SLURMD_OPTIONS
      KillMode=process
      LimitNOFILE=131072
      LimitMEMLOCK=infinity
      LimitSTACK=infinity
      Restart=on-failure
      RestartSec=10

      [Install]
      WantedBy=multi-user.target
  - path: /opt/azcluster/install-compute.sh
    permissions: '0755'
    content: |
      #!/usr/bin/env bash
      set -euo pipefail
      # Defense-in-depth chmod (see scheduler.yaml.tmpl for rationale).
      trap 'chmod 0644 /etc/slurm/plugstack.conf 2>/dev/null || true' EXIT
      . /etc/azcluster/install.env

      if [ -n "${EXTRA_PACKAGES:-}" ]; then
        apt-get -o DPkg::Lock::Timeout=600 install -y ${EXTRA_PACKAGES}
      fi

      mkdir -p /shared /opt/azcluster /var/log/azcluster /var/spool/slurmd /var/log/slurm /etc/slurm /opt/pyxis /run/enroot

      # --- Local NVMe RAID-0 for fast ephemeral scratch ----------------------
      # Azure HPC/AI SKUs (ND/NC/HB/Ls-series) expose local NVMe disks under
      # the model strings "Microsoft NVMe Direct Disk" or "Microsoft NVMe
      # Direct Disk v2". On ND96isr_H100_v5 that's 8 x ~3.5 TB unformatted
      # NVMe -- orders of magnitude faster and larger than the /mnt resource
      # disk (~956 GB SCSI-attached SSD) and essential for importing
      # multi-GB CUDA/AI container images via Enroot.
      #
      # Data is ephemeral (lost on stop-dealloc). We persist the array via
      # /etc/mdadm/mdadm.conf + /etc/fstab so normal reboots reattach
      # cleanly; nofail keeps boot moving if the disks ever disappear.
      NVME_DEVS=$(lsblk -d -n -p -o NAME,MODEL 2>/dev/null \
        | awk 'BEGIN{IGNORECASE=1} /Microsoft NVMe Direct Disk/ {print $1}' \
        | sort -u)
      NVME_COUNT=$(printf "%s\n" "${NVME_DEVS}" | grep -c . || true)
      if [ "${NVME_COUNT}" -ge 1 ] && ! mountpoint -q /mnt/nvme; then
        echo "Found ${NVME_COUNT} local NVMe disk(s) for RAID-0 scratch: ${NVME_DEVS}"
        apt-get -o DPkg::Lock::Timeout=600 install -y --no-install-recommends mdadm
        for d in ${NVME_DEVS}; do
          swapoff "$d" 2>/dev/null || true
          umount "$d" 2>/dev/null || true
          wipefs -af "$d" 2>/dev/null || true
        done
        if [ "${NVME_COUNT}" -ge 2 ]; then
          mdadm --create --verbose --force --run /dev/md/azcluster_nvme \
            --level=0 --chunk=128 --metadata=1.2 \
            --raid-devices="${NVME_COUNT}" \
            --name=azcluster_nvme --homehost=any \
            ${NVME_DEVS}
          BLKDEV=/dev/md/azcluster_nvme
        else
          BLKDEV=$(echo "${NVME_DEVS}" | head -n1)
        fi
        mkfs.ext4 -F -L azcluster_nvme -E lazy_itable_init=1,lazy_journal_init=1 "${BLKDEV}"
        mkdir -p /mnt/nvme
        mount -o noatime,nodiratime,discard "${BLKDEV}" /mnt/nvme
        chmod 1777 /mnt/nvme
        if [ "${NVME_COUNT}" -ge 2 ]; then
          mkdir -p /etc/mdadm
          mdadm --detail --scan | tee -a /etc/mdadm/mdadm.conf >/dev/null
          update-initramfs -u 2>/dev/null || true
        fi
        if ! grep -q "azcluster_nvme" /etc/fstab; then
          echo "LABEL=azcluster_nvme /mnt/nvme ext4 defaults,nofail,noatime,nodiratime,discard,x-systemd.device-timeout=10 0 2" >> /etc/fstab
        fi
      fi

      # --- Enroot scratch base: prefer NVMe RAID, fall back to /mnt ---------
      if mountpoint -q /mnt/nvme; then
        ENROOT_BASE=/mnt/nvme
      elif mountpoint -q /mnt; then
        ENROOT_BASE=/mnt
      else
        ENROOT_BASE=/var/lib
      fi
      mkdir -p "${ENROOT_BASE}/enroot/runtime" "${ENROOT_BASE}/enroot-data/cache"
      chmod 1777 "${ENROOT_BASE}/enroot" "${ENROOT_BASE}/enroot/runtime" "${ENROOT_BASE}/enroot-data" "${ENROOT_BASE}/enroot-data/cache"
      if [ "${ENROOT_BASE}" != "/var/lib" ]; then
        [ -L /var/lib/enroot ] || { rm -rf /var/lib/enroot; ln -s "${ENROOT_BASE}/enroot" /var/lib/enroot; }
        [ -L /var/lib/enroot-data ] || { rm -rf /var/lib/enroot-data; ln -s "${ENROOT_BASE}/enroot-data" /var/lib/enroot-data; }
      fi
      chmod 1777 /run/enroot

      cat > /etc/security/limits.d/99-azcluster.conf <<'EOF'
      * soft memlock unlimited
      * hard memlock unlimited
      * soft stack unlimited
      * hard stack unlimited
      * soft nofile 1048576
      * hard nofile 1048576
      EOF

      cat > /etc/modprobe.d/azcluster-mlx5.conf <<'EOF'
      options mlx5_core prof_sel=3
      EOF

      if lspci -d 15b3: 2>/dev/null | grep -q .; then
        for dev in $(ls /sys/class/net 2>/dev/null); do
          drv=$(ethtool -i "$dev" 2>/dev/null | awk '/^driver:/ {print $2}' || true)
          if [ "$drv" = "mlx5_core" ]; then
            ethtool --set-priv-flags "$dev" pcie_relaxed_ordering_enable on 2>/dev/null || true
            ethtool -C "$dev" adaptive-rx on adaptive-tx on 2>/dev/null || true
          fi
        done
      fi

      IFACE=$(ip -4 -o route show default | awk '{print $5; exit}')
      IPV4=$(ip -4 -o addr show "${IFACE}" | awk '{print $4}' | cut -d/ -f1)
      OCT3=$(echo "${IPV4}" | cut -d. -f3)
      OCT4=$(echo "${IPV4}" | cut -d. -f4)
      NODE_INDEX=$(( (OCT3 * 256 + OCT4) - (4 * 256 + 4) + 1 ))
      NEW_HOSTNAME="${AZCLUSTER_NAME}-${AZCLUSTER_POOL}-$(printf '%04d' ${NODE_INDEX})"
      hostnamectl set-hostname "${NEW_HOSTNAME}"
      sed -i '/127\.0\.1\.1/d' /etc/hosts
      # Map hostname to the eth0 IPv4 (NOT 127.0.1.1) so cross-node
      # torch.distributed/Gloo connectFullMesh doesn't try to dial localhost.
      # NGC PyTorch containers call gethostbyname(hostname) for the rendezvous
      # address; the Ubuntu cloud-image default of `127.0.1.1 <hostname>` makes
      # every remote rank attempt to connect to its own loopback.
      echo "${IPV4} ${NEW_HOSTNAME}" >> /etc/hosts

      if ! grep -q " /shared " /etc/fstab; then
        echo "${SHARED_MOUNT_IP}:/${SHARED_EXPORT_PATH} /shared nfs rw,hard,rsize=262144,wsize=262144,vers=4.1,tcp,_netdev 0 0" >> /etc/fstab
      fi
      for i in $(seq 1 60); do
        mountpoint -q /shared && break
        mount /shared && break
        echo "waiting for NFS at ${SHARED_MOUNT_IP}:/${SHARED_EXPORT_PATH}..."
        sleep 5
      done
      mountpoint -q /shared

      if [ -n "${AMLFS_MOUNT_CMD:-}" ]; then
        mkdir -p /amlfs
        apt-get -o DPkg::Lock::Timeout=600 install -y --no-install-recommends amlfs-lustre-client-$(uname -r) || apt-get -o DPkg::Lock::Timeout=600 install -y --no-install-recommends amlfs-lustre-client || true
        if ! mountpoint -q /amlfs; then
          eval "${AMLFS_MOUNT_CMD} /amlfs" || echo "AMLFS mount failed; continuing" >&2
        fi
      fi

      SCHED_DIR="/shared/sched/${AZCLUSTER_NAME}"
      while [ ! -f "${SCHED_DIR}/munge.key" ]; do sleep 5; done
      install -o munge -g munge -m 0400 "${SCHED_DIR}/munge.key" /etc/munge/munge.key

      curl -fsSL https://packages.microsoft.com/keys/microsoft.asc | gpg --batch --yes --dearmor -o /usr/share/keyrings/microsoft-prod.gpg
      ARCH=$(dpkg --print-architecture)
      CODENAME=$(. /etc/os-release; echo "${VERSION_CODENAME}")
      echo "deb [arch=${ARCH} signed-by=/usr/share/keyrings/microsoft-prod.gpg] https://packages.microsoft.com/repos/slurm-ubuntu-${CODENAME} stable main" > /etc/apt/sources.list.d/slurm.list
      apt-get -o DPkg::Lock::Timeout=600 update
      apt-get -o DPkg::Lock::Timeout=600 install -y --no-install-recommends \
        slurm-smd \
        slurm-smd-client \
        slurm-smd-slurmd \
        slurm-smd-libnss-slurm \
        slurm-smd-libpam-slurm-adopt

      getent group slurm >/dev/null || groupadd -g 11100 slurm
      id slurm >/dev/null 2>&1 || useradd -u 11100 -g 11100 -d /var/lib/slurm -s /usr/sbin/nologin -c "Slurm" slurm
      chown -R slurm:slurm /var/spool/slurmd /var/log/slurm

      cd /tmp
      curl -fsSL --retry 8 --retry-delay 5 -o enroot.deb "https://github.com/NVIDIA/enroot/releases/download/v${ENROOT_VERSION}/enroot_${ENROOT_VERSION}-1_${ARCH}.deb"
      curl -fsSL --retry 8 --retry-delay 5 -o enroot-caps.deb "https://github.com/NVIDIA/enroot/releases/download/v${ENROOT_VERSION}/enroot+caps_${ENROOT_VERSION}-1_${ARCH}.deb"
      apt-get -o DPkg::Lock::Timeout=600 install -y ./enroot.deb ./enroot-caps.deb

      mkdir -p /etc/enroot /etc/enroot/environ.d
      mkdir -p "${ENROOT_BASE}/enroot-temp"
      chmod 1777 "${ENROOT_BASE}/enroot-temp"
      cat > /etc/enroot/enroot.conf <<EOF
      ENROOT_RUNTIME_PATH    /var/lib/enroot/runtime/user-\$(id -u)
      ENROOT_CACHE_PATH      /var/lib/enroot-data/cache/user-\$(id -u)
      ENROOT_DATA_PATH       /var/lib/enroot-data/user-\$(id -u)
      ENROOT_TEMP_PATH       ${ENROOT_BASE}/enroot-temp
      ENROOT_SQUASH_OPTIONS  -comp lzo -noI
      ENROOT_MOUNT_HOME      yes
      ENROOT_RESTRICT_DEV    yes
      ENROOT_ROOTFS_WRITABLE yes
      ENROOT_REMAP_ROOT      yes
      EOF
      chmod 0644 /etc/enroot/enroot.conf

      BASE="https://github.com/${AZCLUSTER_REPO}/releases/download/${AZCLUSTER_VERSION}"
      curl -fsSL --retry 8 --retry-delay 5 -o /opt/pyxis/spank_pyxis.so "${BASE}/spank_pyxis-${AZCLUSTER_VERSION}-x86_64-linux.so"
      chmod 0755 /opt/pyxis/spank_pyxis.so

      cd /tmp
      HC_TARBALL="azhealthcheck-${AZCLUSTER_VERSION}-x86_64-linux.tar.gz"
      curl -fsSL --retry 8 --retry-delay 5 -O "${BASE}/${HC_TARBALL}"
      tar -xzf "${HC_TARBALL}" -C /usr/local/bin/
      chmod 0755 /usr/local/bin/azhealthcheck
      cat > /usr/local/sbin/azcluster-healthcheck <<'HC_EOF'
      #!/bin/bash
      SERVICES="slurmd,prometheus,node_exporter"
      if command -v nvidia-smi >/dev/null 2>&1 && nvidia-smi -L 2>/dev/null | grep -qE '^GPU [0-9]+:'; then
        SERVICES="${SERVICES},dcgm-exporter"
      fi
      exec /usr/local/bin/azhealthcheck \
        --services "${SERVICES}" \
        --metrics-dir /var/lib/node_exporter/textfile_collector \
        "$@"
      HC_EOF
      chmod 0755 /usr/local/sbin/azcluster-healthcheck

      cat > /etc/slurm/plugstack.conf <<EOF
      required /opt/pyxis/spank_pyxis.so runtime_path=/var/lib/enroot/runtime
      EOF
      # cloud-init runcmd inherits a 0077 umask; plugstack.conf MUST be
      # world-readable because srun loads spank plugins at submit time.
      chmod 0644 /etc/slurm/plugstack.conf

      MEM=$(awk '/^MemTotal/ {printf "%d\n", $2/1024 * 0.95}' /proc/meminfo)
      GRES_OPT=""
      EXTRA_CONF=""
      FEATURES="cloud,pool_${AZCLUSTER_POOL}"
      GPU_COUNT=0
      if command -v nvidia-smi >/dev/null 2>&1; then
        GPU_COUNT=$(nvidia-smi -L 2>/dev/null | grep -cE '^GPU [0-9]+:' || true)
      fi
      if [ "${GPU_COUNT}" -gt 0 ]; then
        # Extract short SKU name (h100, h200, a100, ...) from full product
        # string like "NVIDIA H100 80GB HBM3" — match the first token of
        # form <letter><digits>+ and lowercase it. Earlier versions used
        # `$NF` which produced "hbm3" and broke Slurm Gres registration.
        GPU_NAME=$(nvidia-smi --query-gpu=name --format=csv,noheader -i 0 \
          | head -1 \
          | awk '{for(i=1;i<=NF;i++) if($i ~ /^[A-Za-z][0-9]+$/) {print tolower($i); exit}}')
        [ -z "${GPU_NAME}" ] && GPU_NAME="gpu"
        # Detect HBM tier for feature labelling.
        HBM=$(nvidia-smi --query-gpu=name --format=csv,noheader -i 0 \
          | head -1 \
          | awk '{for(i=1;i<=NF;i++) if($i ~ /^[Hh][Bb][Mm]/) {print tolower($i); exit}}')
        GRES_OPT="Gres=gpu:${GPU_NAME}:${GPU_COUNT}"
        FEATURES="${FEATURES},gpu,${GPU_NAME}"
        [ -n "${HBM}" ] && FEATURES="${FEATURES},${HBM}"
        # On Azure NDv5 (and similar AI SKUs) Slurm's default S:C:T detection
        # bunches all cores into one socket, which interacts badly with NCCL
        # GPU<->NIC affinity. Tell slurmd to treat each L3 cache as a socket.
        EXTRA_CONF=" Parameters=l3cache_as_socket"

        # Configless distribution does NOT push gres.conf. Each compute
        # writes its own. AutoDetect=nvml matches the slurmctld gres.conf
        # and lets slurm-smd discover device files via NVML.
        cat > /etc/slurm/gres.conf <<EOF
      AutoDetect=nvml
      EOF
        chown slurm:slurm /etc/slurm/gres.conf

        nvidia-smi -pm 1 2>/dev/null || true
        for i in $(seq 0 $((GPU_COUNT-1))); do
          nvidia-smi -i ${i} -c EXCLUSIVE_PROCESS 2>/dev/null || true
        done

        # InfiniBand userspace devices ship as 0660 root:root on the
        # microsoft-dsvm:ubuntu-hpc image. The enroot 99-mellanox.sh hook
        # (triggered by MELLANOX_VISIBLE_DEVICES=all, set below in
        # environ.d/50-nccl.env) bind-mounts these device nodes into the
        # container preserving host perms. With ENROOT_REMAP_ROOT yes
        # (set below for DGXC compatibility) the in-container "root" maps
        # to a host non-root uid and cannot open 0660 root:root devices.
        # Open them 0666 via a persistent udev rule and apply immediately
        # for the current boot (devices are already present by the time
        # cloud-init runs).
        cat > /etc/udev/rules.d/91-azcluster-ib-perms.rules <<'EOF'
        KERNEL=="uverbs*", MODE="0666"
        KERNEL=="rdma_cm", MODE="0666"
        KERNEL=="ucm*", MODE="0666"
        KERNEL=="umad*", MODE="0666"
        KERNEL=="issm*", MODE="0666"
      EOF
        chmod 0644 /etc/udev/rules.d/91-azcluster-ib-perms.rules
        udevadm control --reload-rules 2>/dev/null || true
        udevadm trigger --subsystem-match=infiniband_verbs --action=change 2>/dev/null || true
        udevadm trigger --subsystem-match=infiniband --action=change 2>/dev/null || true
        chmod 0666 /dev/infiniband/uverbs* /dev/infiniband/rdma_cm /dev/infiniband/ucm* /dev/infiniband/umad* /dev/infiniband/issm* 2>/dev/null || true

        # NOTE: NO UCX_TLS=tcp here. Earlier versions set it because the
        # NCCL plugin's OOB bootstrap path uses TCP, but UCX_TLS is a GLOBAL
        # transport policy: setting it to "tcp" tells HPC-X/OpenMPI UCX to
        # use TCP transport on every UCX_NET_DEVICES interface, INCLUDING
        # mlx5_ib* which do NOT expose TCP sockets. The result is
        # `UCX ERROR no usable transports/devices (asked tcp on
        # network:mlx5_ib0:1,...)` and OMPI falls back to its TCP BTL,
        # which then hangs in `btl_tcp_endpoint_recv_connect_ack:
        # received unexpected process identifier`. NCCL itself does NOT
        # use UCX (it uses its own IBext_v10 plugin), so leaving UCX_TLS
        # unset lets UCX auto-detect rc,ud,sm,self for IB MPI workloads
        # (e.g. /usr/local/bin/all_reduce_perf_mpi from NGC containers)
        # without touching NCCL's IB path. v0.19.4 fix.
        cat > /etc/profile.d/nccl-azcluster.sh <<'EOF'
        export NCCL_IB_DISABLE=0
        export NCCL_IB_HCA=mlx5_ib
        export NCCL_IB_PCI_RELAXED_ORDERING=1
        export NCCL_TOPO_FILE=/opt/microsoft/ndv5-topo.xml
        export NCCL_SOCKET_IFNAME=eth0
        export NCCL_MIN_NCHANNELS=32
      EOF
        chmod 0644 /etc/profile.d/nccl-azcluster.sh

        # DGXC + most NCCL containers need these env vars set INSIDE the
        # container. Enroot's environ.d gets sourced by Pyxis on container
        # start, unlike /etc/profile.d which only fires for host login shells.
        # MELLANOX_VISIBLE_DEVICES=all triggers enroot's /etc/enroot/hooks.d/
        # 99-mellanox.sh hook to bind-mount /dev/infiniband/{uverbs,umad,issm}*
        # + /dev/infiniband/rdma_cm into the container. Without it, enroot
        # does not expose /dev/infiniband by default and NCCL inside the
        # container logs "NET/IB : No device found." then falls back to
        # OOB ethernet (~5-15 GB/s vs ~430 GB/s on IB+SHARP).
        # See nccl-azcluster.sh above for why UCX_TLS is intentionally
        # absent here. UCX_NET_DEVICES is still listed so HPC-X picks the
        # 8 NDR IB rails by name when it auto-detects; it does NOT force
        # a transport.
        cat > /etc/enroot/environ.d/50-nccl.env <<'EOF'
        NCCL_IB_DISABLE=0
        NCCL_IB_HCA=mlx5_ib
        NCCL_IB_PCI_RELAXED_ORDERING=1
        NCCL_TOPO_FILE=/opt/microsoft/ndv5-topo.xml
        NCCL_SOCKET_IFNAME=eth0
        NCCL_MIN_NCHANNELS=32
        UCX_NET_DEVICES=mlx5_ib0:1,mlx5_ib1:1,mlx5_ib2:1,mlx5_ib3:1,mlx5_ib4:1,mlx5_ib5:1,mlx5_ib6:1,mlx5_ib7:1
        MELLANOX_VISIBLE_DEVICES=all
      EOF
        chmod 0644 /etc/enroot/environ.d/50-nccl.env

        # Bind-mount the NDv5 NCCL topology file into every Pyxis container.
        # NCCL_TOPO_FILE references a host path; without this mount NCCL
        # falls back to autodetect inside the container and loses the
        # optimal channel layout.
        mkdir -p /etc/enroot/mounts.d
        cat > /etc/enroot/mounts.d/50-azcluster.fstab <<'EOF'
        /opt/microsoft /opt/microsoft none x-create=dir,bind,ro,nosuid,nodev
      EOF
        chmod 0644 /etc/enroot/mounts.d/50-azcluster.fstab
      fi

      # Cross-node containerised MPI via Pyxis needs two pieces working
      # together (CCWS / Azure HPC pattern; see AGENTS.md PMIx gotcha):
      #   1) slurmd must export PMIX_MCA_* env so the PMIx server tmpdir
      #      / security / GDS modules don't drift between ranks.
      #   2) Enroot must propagate PMIX_* + SLURM_* env into the container
      #      and bind-mount $PMIX_SERVER_TMPDIR; the 50-slurm-pmi.sh hook
      #      does both. Without it Pyxis containers can't talk to the
      #      host PMIx server and each rank initialises as a singleton
      #      MPI world.
      # The hook content is upstream NVIDIA Enroot (Apache 2.0); pinned
      # in-tree so this works whether or not the enroot .deb ships
      # /usr/share/enroot/hooks.d/extra/.
      mkdir -p /etc/enroot/hooks.d
      cat > /etc/enroot/hooks.d/50-slurm-pmi.sh <<'EOF'
      #! /usr/bin/env bash
      # Upstream NVIDIA/enroot conf/hooks/extra/50-slurm-pmi.sh (Apache 2.0)
      set -euo pipefail
      shopt -s lastpipe

      if [ -z "${SLURM_JOB_ID-}" ] || [ -z "${SLURM_STEP_ID-}" ]; then
          exit 0
      fi

      for var in $(compgen -e "SLURM_"); do
          printf "%s=%s\n" "${var}" "${!var}" >> "${ENROOT_ENVIRON}"
      done

      if [[ -z "${SLURM_MPI_TYPE-}" || "${SLURM_MPI_TYPE}" == pmix* ]] && compgen -e "PMIX_" > /dev/null; then
          for var in $(compgen -e "PMIX_"); do
              printf "%s=%s\n" "${var}" "${!var}" >> "${ENROOT_ENVIRON}"
          done
          if [ -n "${PMIX_PTL_MODULE-}" ] && [ -z "${PMIX_MCA_ptl-}" ]; then
              printf "PMIX_MCA_ptl=%s\n" ${PMIX_PTL_MODULE} >> "${ENROOT_ENVIRON}"
          fi
          if [ -n "${PMIX_SECURITY_MODE-}" ] && [ -z "${PMIX_MCA_psec-}" ]; then
              printf "PMIX_MCA_psec=%s\n" ${PMIX_SECURITY_MODE} >> "${ENROOT_ENVIRON}"
          fi
          if [ -n "${PMIX_GDS_MODULE-}" ] && [ -z "${PMIX_MCA_gds-}" ]; then
              printf "PMIX_MCA_gds=%s\n" ${PMIX_GDS_MODULE} >> "${ENROOT_ENVIRON}"
          fi
          if [ -n "${PMIX_SERVER_TMPDIR-}" ]; then
              printf "%s x-create=dir,bind,rw,nosuid,noexec,nodev,private,nofail\n" "${PMIX_SERVER_TMPDIR}" >> "${ENROOT_MOUNTS}"
          fi
      fi

      if compgen -e "PMI_" > /dev/null; then
          for var in $(compgen -e "PMI_"); do
              printf "%s=%s\n" "${var}" "${!var}" >> "${ENROOT_ENVIRON}"
          done
      fi
      EOF
      chmod 0755 /etc/enroot/hooks.d/50-slurm-pmi.sh

      cat > /etc/enroot/hooks.d/50-slurm-pytorch.sh <<'EOF'
      #! /usr/bin/env bash
      # Upstream NVIDIA/enroot conf/hooks/extra/50-slurm-pytorch.sh (Apache 2.0)
      set -eu

      if ! grep -q "^PYTORCH_VERSION=" "${ENROOT_ENVIRON}"; then
          exit 0
      fi

      if [ -n "${SLURM_STEP_NODELIST-}" ] && ! grep -q "^MASTER_ADDR=" "${ENROOT_ENVIRON}" && command -v scontrol > /dev/null; then
          printf "MASTER_ADDR=%s\n" "$(scontrol show hostname "${SLURM_STEP_NODELIST}" | head -n1)" >> "${ENROOT_ENVIRON}"
      fi
      if [ -n "${SLURM_JOB_ID-}" ] && ! grep -q "^MASTER_PORT=" "${ENROOT_ENVIRON}"; then
          printf "MASTER_PORT=%s\n" "$((${SLURM_JOB_ID} % 4536 + 61000))" >> "${ENROOT_ENVIRON}"
      fi
      if [ -n "${SLURM_NTASKS-}" ] && ! grep -q "^WORLD_SIZE=" "${ENROOT_ENVIRON}"; then
          printf "WORLD_SIZE=%s\n" "${SLURM_NTASKS}" >> "${ENROOT_ENVIRON}"
      fi
      if [ -n "${SLURM_PROCID-}" ] && ! grep -q "^RANK=" "${ENROOT_ENVIRON}"; then
          printf "RANK=%s\n" "${SLURM_PROCID}" >> "${ENROOT_ENVIRON}"
      fi
      if [ -n "${SLURM_LOCALID-}" ] && ! grep -q "^LOCAL_RANK=" "${ENROOT_ENVIRON}"; then
          printf "LOCAL_RANK=%s\n" "${SLURM_LOCALID}" >> "${ENROOT_ENVIRON}"
      fi
      if [ "${SLURM_STEP_NUM_TASKS:-1}" -gt "${SLURM_STEP_NUM_NODES:-1}" ] && ! grep -q "^OMP_NUM_THREADS=" "${ENROOT_ENVIRON}"; then
          printf "OMP_NUM_THREADS=1\n" >> "${ENROOT_ENVIRON}"
      fi
      EOF
      chmod 0755 /etc/enroot/hooks.d/50-slurm-pytorch.sh

      # Note: drop CPUs= from --conf so slurmd autodetects sockets/cores/
      # threads consistent with Parameters=l3cache_as_socket. Specifying
      # CPUs= explicitly here loses the L3-as-socket topology.
      # PMIX_MCA_* env: pinned PMIx server/client modules so all ranks
      # negotiate the same transport / security / GDS regardless of host
      # autodetect. HWLOC_COMPONENTS=-opencl avoids a noisy hwloc OpenCL
      # warning on GPU nodes.
      cat > /etc/default/slurmd <<EOF
      SLURMD_OPTIONS=--conf-server ${SCHEDULER_IP}:6817 --conf "RealMemory=${MEM} ${GRES_OPT} Feature=${FEATURES}${EXTRA_CONF}"
      PMIX_MCA_ptl=^usock
      PMIX_MCA_psec=none
      PMIX_SYSTEM_TMPDIR=/var/empty
      PMIX_MCA_gds=hash
      HWLOC_COMPONENTS=-opencl
      EOF

      systemctl daemon-reload
      systemctl enable munge
      systemctl restart munge

      NODE_EXP_VER=1.8.2
      cd /tmp
      curl -fsSL --retry 8 --retry-delay 5 -O "https://github.com/prometheus/node_exporter/releases/download/v${NODE_EXP_VER}/node_exporter-${NODE_EXP_VER}.linux-amd64.tar.gz"
      tar -xzf "node_exporter-${NODE_EXP_VER}.linux-amd64.tar.gz"
      install -m 0755 "node_exporter-${NODE_EXP_VER}.linux-amd64/node_exporter" /usr/local/bin/node_exporter
      id -u node_exporter >/dev/null 2>&1 || useradd --system --no-create-home --shell /usr/sbin/nologin node_exporter
      install -d -o node_exporter -g node_exporter -m 0755 /var/lib/node_exporter/textfile_collector
      cat > /etc/systemd/system/node_exporter.service <<'EOF'
      [Unit]
      Description=Prometheus Node Exporter
      After=network-online.target
      Wants=network-online.target
      [Service]
      User=node_exporter
      ExecStart=/usr/local/bin/node_exporter --web.listen-address=127.0.0.1:9100 --collector.textfile --collector.textfile.directory=/var/lib/node_exporter/textfile_collector
      Restart=on-failure
      RestartSec=5
      [Install]
      WantedBy=multi-user.target
      EOF
      systemctl daemon-reload
      systemctl enable --now node_exporter

      GPU_COUNT=$(nvidia-smi -L 2>/dev/null | grep -cE '^GPU [0-9]+:' || true)
      if [ "${GPU_COUNT:-0}" -gt 0 ]; then
        # The microsoft-dsvm:ubuntu-hpc image ships nvidia-dcgm (`nv-hostengine`
        # listening on TCP localhost:5555) but NOT docker. Use enroot to run
        # the NVIDIA-published dcgm-exporter container, talking to nv-hostengine
        # over TCP. Install once into /opt as a squashfs, then run as a systemd
        # unit.
        DCGM_EXPORTER_IMG=/opt/dcgm-exporter.sqsh
        if [ ! -f "${DCGM_EXPORTER_IMG}" ]; then
          enroot import -o "${DCGM_EXPORTER_IMG}" \
            docker://nvcr.io#nvidia/k8s/dcgm-exporter:4.4.0-4.5.0-ubuntu22.04 \
            2>&1 | tail -5 || true
        fi
        # Custom counters CSV: extends the default set with profile-mode
        # metrics (DCGM_FI_PROF_*) for SM/tensor/memory utilization charts.
        # Profile-mode uses DCGM "profiling slots" — coexists with training
        # workloads on H100 without conflict (DCGM 4.x release notes).
        install -d /etc/dcgm-exporter
        cat > /etc/dcgm-exporter/counters.csv <<'COUNTERS'
      # DCGM_FI field ID, Prometheus metric type, help message
      DCGM_FI_DEV_SM_CLOCK,  gauge, SM clock frequency (MHz).
      DCGM_FI_DEV_MEM_CLOCK, gauge, Memory clock frequency (MHz).
      DCGM_FI_DEV_GPU_TEMP,  gauge, GPU die temperature (C).
      DCGM_FI_DEV_MEMORY_TEMP,                gauge, HBM memory temperature (C).
      DCGM_FI_DEV_GPU_MAX_OP_TEMP,            gauge, Maximum operating temperature (tlimit, 87C on H100 SXM5).
      DCGM_FI_DEV_GPU_TEMP_LIMIT,             gauge, Thermal margin (distance from current temp to nearest slowdown), best-effort.
      DCGM_FI_DEV_SLOWDOWN_TEMP,              gauge, Per-GPU thermal slowdown threshold (C), best-effort.
      DCGM_FI_DEV_SHUTDOWN_TEMP,              gauge, Per-GPU thermal shutdown threshold (C), best-effort.
      DCGM_FI_DEV_CLOCK_THROTTLE_REASONS,     gauge, Bitmask of active clock throttle reasons (HW thermal/power, SW thermal, sync boost, etc).
      DCGM_FI_DEV_THERMAL_VIOLATION,          counter, Total ns the GPU has been throttled due to thermal constraints.
      DCGM_FI_DEV_POWER_VIOLATION,            counter, Total ns the GPU has been throttled due to power constraints.
      DCGM_FI_DEV_SYNC_BOOST_VIOLATION,       counter, Total ns the GPU has been throttled by sync boost.
      DCGM_FI_DEV_BOARD_LIMIT_VIOLATION,      counter, Total ns the GPU has been throttled by board-level limit.
      DCGM_FI_DEV_LOW_UTIL_VIOLATION,         counter, Total ns clocks were reduced due to low utilization.
      DCGM_FI_DEV_RELIABILITY_VIOLATION,      counter, Total ns clocks were reduced for reliability.
      DCGM_FI_DEV_POWER_USAGE,                gauge, Power draw (Watts).
      DCGM_FI_DEV_TOTAL_ENERGY_CONSUMPTION,   counter, Total energy consumed since boot (mJ).
      DCGM_FI_DEV_PCIE_REPLAY_COUNTER,        counter, PCIe replay counter.
      DCGM_FI_DEV_GPU_UTIL,                   gauge, GPU utilization (%).
      DCGM_FI_DEV_MEM_COPY_UTIL,              gauge, Memory utilization (%).
      DCGM_FI_DEV_XID_ERRORS,                 gauge, XID errors.
      DCGM_FI_DEV_ECC_SBE_VOL_TOTAL,          counter, ECC single-bit errors (volatile, session).
      DCGM_FI_DEV_ECC_DBE_VOL_TOTAL,          counter, ECC double-bit errors (volatile, session).
      DCGM_FI_DEV_ECC_SBE_AGG_TOTAL,          counter, ECC single-bit errors (aggregate, lifetime).
      DCGM_FI_DEV_ECC_DBE_AGG_TOTAL,          counter, ECC double-bit errors (aggregate, lifetime).
      DCGM_FI_DEV_RETIRED_SBE,                counter, Retired pages due to single-bit errors.
      DCGM_FI_DEV_RETIRED_DBE,                counter, Retired pages due to double-bit errors.
      DCGM_FI_DEV_RETIRED_PENDING,            gauge, Pages pending retirement.
      DCGM_FI_DEV_FB_FREE,                    gauge, Framebuffer free (MiB).
      DCGM_FI_DEV_FB_USED,                    gauge, Framebuffer used (MiB).
      DCGM_FI_DEV_FB_RESERVED,                gauge, Framebuffer reserved (MiB).
      DCGM_FI_DEV_UNCORRECTABLE_REMAPPED_ROWS,counter, HBM3 uncorrectable remapped rows (driver auto-remap of failing rows).
      DCGM_FI_DEV_CORRECTABLE_REMAPPED_ROWS,  counter, HBM3 correctable remapped rows.
      DCGM_FI_DEV_ROW_REMAP_FAILURE,          gauge, HBM3 row remap failure flag (1 = remapping failed, GPU needs RMA).
      DCGM_FI_DEV_NVLINK_BANDWIDTH_TOTAL,     counter, Total NVLink bandwidth (KiB).
      DCGM_FI_DEV_NVLINK_CRC_FLIT_ERROR_COUNT_TOTAL,   counter, Aggregate NVLink flow-control CRC errors.
      DCGM_FI_DEV_NVLINK_CRC_DATA_ERROR_COUNT_TOTAL,   counter, Aggregate NVLink data CRC errors.
      DCGM_FI_DEV_NVLINK_REPLAY_ERROR_COUNT_TOTAL,     counter, Aggregate NVLink replay errors.
      DCGM_FI_DEV_NVLINK_RECOVERY_ERROR_COUNT_TOTAL,   counter, Aggregate NVLink recovery errors.
      DCGM_FI_PROF_GR_ENGINE_ACTIVE,          gauge, Ratio of time the graphics engine is active.
      DCGM_FI_PROF_SM_ACTIVE,                 gauge, Ratio of time at least one warp is active on SMs.
      DCGM_FI_PROF_SM_OCCUPANCY,              gauge, Ratio of warps resident vs theoretical max.
      DCGM_FI_PROF_PIPE_TENSOR_ACTIVE,        gauge, Ratio of cycles the tensor cores are active.
      DCGM_FI_PROF_DRAM_ACTIVE,               gauge, Ratio of cycles the device memory is active.
      DCGM_FI_PROF_PIPE_FP64_ACTIVE,          gauge, Ratio of cycles FP64 pipes are active.
      DCGM_FI_PROF_PIPE_FP32_ACTIVE,          gauge, Ratio of cycles FP32 pipes are active.
      DCGM_FI_PROF_PIPE_FP16_ACTIVE,          gauge, Ratio of cycles FP16 pipes are active.
      DCGM_FI_PROF_PCIE_TX_BYTES,             counter, PCIe TX bytes.
      DCGM_FI_PROF_PCIE_RX_BYTES,             counter, PCIe RX bytes.
      DCGM_FI_PROF_NVLINK_TX_BYTES,           counter, NVLink TX bytes.
      DCGM_FI_PROF_NVLINK_RX_BYTES,           counter, NVLink RX bytes.
      COUNTERS
        sed -i 's|^      ||' /etc/dcgm-exporter/counters.csv
        chmod 0644 /etc/dcgm-exporter/counters.csv
        cat > /etc/systemd/system/dcgm-exporter.service <<'EOF'
      [Unit]
      Description=NVIDIA DCGM Prometheus exporter (via enroot)
      After=nvidia-dcgm.service network-online.target
      Requires=nvidia-dcgm.service
      Wants=network-online.target

      [Service]
      Type=simple
      ExecStartPre=-/usr/bin/enroot remove -f dcgm-exporter
      ExecStartPre=/usr/bin/enroot create --name dcgm-exporter /opt/dcgm-exporter.sqsh
      ExecStart=/usr/bin/enroot start --rw \
        --mount /etc/dcgm-exporter:/etc/dcgm-exporter \
        -e DCGM_EXPORTER_LISTEN=127.0.0.1:9400 \
        -e DCGM_REMOTE_HOSTENGINE_INFO=localhost:5555 \
        dcgm-exporter -f /etc/dcgm-exporter/counters.csv
      ExecStopPost=-/usr/bin/enroot remove -f dcgm-exporter
      Restart=on-failure
      RestartSec=10

      [Install]
      WantedBy=multi-user.target
      EOF
        chmod 0644 /etc/systemd/system/dcgm-exporter.service
        systemctl daemon-reload
        systemctl enable --now dcgm-exporter
      fi

      MON_UAI_CLIENT_ID="{{MON_UAI_CLIENT_ID}}"
      AMW_INGEST_URL="{{AMW_INGEST_URL}}"
      if [ -n "${MON_UAI_CLIENT_ID}" ] && [ -n "${AMW_INGEST_URL}" ]; then
        PROM_VER=3.3.0
        cd /tmp
        curl -fsSL --retry 8 --retry-delay 5 -O "https://github.com/prometheus/prometheus/releases/download/v${PROM_VER}/prometheus-${PROM_VER}.linux-amd64.tar.gz"
        tar -xzf "prometheus-${PROM_VER}.linux-amd64.tar.gz"
        install -d /opt/prometheus
        install -m 0755 "prometheus-${PROM_VER}.linux-amd64/prometheus" /opt/prometheus/prometheus
        install -d /mnt/prometheus/data
        id -u prometheus >/dev/null 2>&1 || useradd --system --no-create-home --shell /usr/sbin/nologin prometheus
        chown -R prometheus:prometheus /opt/prometheus /mnt/prometheus
        INSTANCE_NAME=$(hostname)
        SUBSCRIPTION_ID="{{SUBSCRIPTION_ID}}"
        RG_NAME=$(curl -fsSL -H Metadata:true "http://169.254.169.254/metadata/instance/compute/resourceGroupName?api-version=2021-02-01&format=text")
        cat > /opt/prometheus/prometheus.yml <<EOF
      global:
        scrape_interval: 15s
        evaluation_interval: 15s
        external_labels:
          subscription: ${SUBSCRIPTION_ID}
          cluster: ${RG_NAME}/{{CLUSTER_NAME}}
          nodename: ${INSTANCE_NAME}
          role: compute
          pool: {{POOL_NAME}}
      remote_write:
        - url: "${AMW_INGEST_URL}"
          azuread:
            cloud: AzurePublic
            managed_identity:
              client_id: ${MON_UAI_CLIENT_ID}
      scrape_configs:
        - job_name: node_exporter
          static_configs:
            - targets: ['127.0.0.1:9100']
      EOF
        if [ "${GPU_COUNT:-0}" -gt 0 ]; then
          cat >> /opt/prometheus/prometheus.yml <<'EOF'
        - job_name: dcgm_exporter
          static_configs:
            - targets: ['127.0.0.1:9400']
      EOF
        fi
        chmod 0644 /opt/prometheus/prometheus.yml
        cat > /etc/systemd/system/prometheus.service <<'EOF'
      [Unit]
      Description=Prometheus
      After=network-online.target
      Wants=network-online.target
      [Service]
      User=prometheus
      ExecStart=/opt/prometheus/prometheus --config.file=/opt/prometheus/prometheus.yml --storage.tsdb.path=/mnt/prometheus/data --web.listen-address=127.0.0.1:9090
      Restart=on-failure
      RestartSec=10
      [Install]
      WantedBy=multi-user.target
      EOF
        systemctl daemon-reload
        systemctl enable --now prometheus
      fi

      systemctl enable --now slurmd

      DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get -o DPkg::Lock::Timeout=600 install -y \
        sssd sssd-ldap sssd-tools libnss-sss libpam-sss oddjob-mkhomedir
      cat > /etc/sssd/sssd.conf <<EOF
      [sssd]
      domains = azcluster
      config_file_version = 2
      services = nss, pam, ssh

      [domain/azcluster]
      id_provider = ldap
      auth_provider = ldap
      ldap_uri = ldap://${SCHEDULER_IP}
      ldap_search_base = dc=azcluster,dc=local
      ldap_user_extra_attrs = sshPublicKey:sshPublicKey
      ldap_user_ssh_public_key = sshPublicKey
      enumerate = false
      cache_credentials = true
      override_homedir = /shared/home/%u
      entry_cache_timeout = 60
      entry_cache_user_timeout = 60
      EOF
      chmod 0600 /etc/sssd/sssd.conf
      chown root:root /etc/sssd/sssd.conf
      pam-auth-update --enable mkhomedir
      sed -i 's|^session\s\+optional\s\+pam_mkhomedir\.so.*|session optional pam_mkhomedir.so umask=0077|' /etc/pam.d/common-session || true
      if ! grep -q '^AuthorizedKeysCommand /usr/bin/sss_ssh_authorizedkeys' /etc/ssh/sshd_config; then
        printf '\nAuthorizedKeysCommand /usr/bin/sss_ssh_authorizedkeys\nAuthorizedKeysCommandUser nobody\n' >> /etc/ssh/sshd_config
      fi
      systemctl enable --now sssd
      systemctl restart ssh

      cat > /etc/sudoers.d/cluster-admins <<'SUDOERS'
      %cluster-admins ALL=(ALL) NOPASSWD: ALL
      SUDOERS
      chmod 0440 /etc/sudoers.d/cluster-admins
      visudo -cf /etc/sudoers.d/cluster-admins

      if [ -n "${AZCP_VERSION:-}" ]; then
        AZCP_URL="https://github.com/edwardsp/azcp/releases/download/${AZCP_VERSION}/azcp-x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu.tar.gz"
        curl -fsSL -o /tmp/azcp.tar.gz "${AZCP_URL}"
        tar -xzf /tmp/azcp.tar.gz --strip-components=1 -C /usr/local/bin/ azcp-x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu/azcp
        chmod 0755 /usr/local/bin/azcp
        rm -f /tmp/azcp.tar.gz
      fi

      if [ -n "${STORAGE_ACCOUNT_NAME:-}" ]; then
        cat > /etc/profile.d/azcluster-storage.sh <<'PROFILE_EOF'
      export AZCLUSTER_STORAGE_ACCOUNT="{{STORAGE_ACCOUNT_NAME}}"
      export AZCLUSTER_STORAGE_URL="{{STORAGE_DATA_CONTAINER_URL}}"
      export AZCLUSTER_USER_BLOB_URL="${AZCLUSTER_STORAGE_URL}/users/${USER}"
      export AZCLUSTER_USER_NVME="/mnt/nvme/users/${USER}"
      export AZCLUSTER_SHARED_BLOB_URL="${AZCLUSTER_STORAGE_URL}/shared"
      export AZURE_CLIENT_ID="{{UAI_CLIENT_ID}}"
      PROFILE_EOF
        sed -i 's|^      ||' /etc/profile.d/azcluster-storage.sh
        chmod 0644 /etc/profile.d/azcluster-storage.sh
      fi

      mkdir -p /etc/slurm/prolog.d
      cat > /etc/slurm/prolog.d/10-azcluster-user-nvme.sh <<'PROLOG_EOF'
      #!/bin/bash
      set -euo pipefail
      [ -d /mnt/nvme ] || exit 0
      [ -z "${SLURM_JOB_USER:-}" ] && exit 0
      [ -z "${SLURM_JOB_UID:-}" ] && exit 0
      [ -z "${SLURM_JOB_GID:-}" ] && exit 0
      install -d -o "${SLURM_JOB_UID}" -g "${SLURM_JOB_GID}" -m 0700 \
        "/mnt/nvme/users/${SLURM_JOB_USER}"
      exit 0
      PROLOG_EOF
      sed -i 's|^      ||' /etc/slurm/prolog.d/10-azcluster-user-nvme.sh
      chmod 0755 /etc/slurm/prolog.d/10-azcluster-user-nvme.sh

      touch /var/log/azcluster/ready

runcmd:
  - systemctl stop unattended-upgrades.service apt-daily.service apt-daily-upgrade.service 2>/dev/null || true
  - systemctl mask unattended-upgrades.service apt-daily.service apt-daily-upgrade.service apt-daily.timer apt-daily-upgrade.timer 2>/dev/null || true
  - bash -lc 'i=0; while fuser /var/lib/dpkg/lock-frontend /var/lib/dpkg/lock /var/lib/apt/lists/lock >/dev/null 2>&1; do sleep 5; i=$((i+1)); [ $i -gt 120 ] && break; done'
  - bash -lc 'mkdir -p /var/log/azcluster && /opt/azcluster/install-compute.sh 2>&1 | tee -a /var/log/azcluster/install.log'
